mcp_shared_server.reason: Uses shared MCP server lifecycle or process-visible MCP routing state.

ServerNetworkManager.bootstrapSocket.reason: Mutates the shared bootstrap socket configuration.

GlobalSettingsStore.mcpAutoStart.reason: Mutates the shared MCP autostart setting.

global_settings.reason: Mutates shared app settings through production-shaped test paths.

UserDefaults.standard.reason: Mutates the process-wide standard UserDefaults domain.

GitWorkspaceStateAuthority.shared.reason: Uses the shared git workspace state authority singleton.

git_process_admission.reason: Uses shared git process admission controls or observations.

WorkspaceManager.reason: Mutates shared workspace manager lifecycle or listener state.

workspace_manager.reason: Mutates shared workspace manager lifecycle or listener state.
